🤖 AI Provider

Get Free API Key →
Get Groq API Key →

Runs Google's Gemini Nano model locally on your device. No internet connection or API keys are required.

Prerequisites:
1. Open chrome://flags/#optimization-guide-on-device-model and set to Enabled BypassPerfRequirement.
2. Open chrome://flags/#prompt-api-for-gemini-nano and set to Enabled.
3. Relaunch Chrome and wait a few minutes for the model to download (check progress in chrome://components under "Optimization Guide On Device Model").

📝 Quiz Automation
